experience.description: Developed a full-stack e-commerce web application as a final-year university project, utilizing Node.js and Express.js for the backend. Followed the Model-View-Controller (MVC) architectural pattern and containerized using Docker and Docker Compose for streamlined deployment. Implemented user authentication, product management (CRUD operations), a dynamic shopping cart system, order processing, and ensured responsive design. Demonstrated proficiency in backend development, RESTful API design, and containerization.

Developed a real-time chat application utilizing the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js). Features include secure user authentication, instant messaging capabilities, responsive design, backend integration for server-side operations and API endpoints, frontend development using React.js, and database management with MongoDB. Demonstrated proficiency in full-stack web development and real-time communication technologies.

Developed a digital version of the classic 2048 puzzle game using Unity. Implemented core game logic, including tile movement, merging, and score calculation. Designed a user-friendly interface displaying the game grid, current score, and game status. Built and packaged the game for multiple platforms, ensuring accessibility and performance. Demonstrated skills in Unity game development, C# programming, and software deployment.
